_comment: Compilagent-driven joint NAS+HW co-search on MNIST/MLP-Mixer with LIF spiking. The optimizer drives a `compilagent.OptimizationSession` over the registered `mimarsinan_layout` backend through the pydantic-ai harness using `mistral-large-latest`. Pop size, max_candidates and option lists are kept small so a full architecture-search step finishes in a few minutes for live demos.

arch_search._comment: Compilagent session-based optimizer using pydantic-ai harness + mistral-large-latest. No primary objective — every axis is equally weighted; the agent uses pareto_front / metric_summary / query_top_candidates to navigate the multi-objective space. `objectives` is intentionally omitted so this run uses `default_objectives_for_mode('joint')` (the same 5 objectives NSGA2 and AgentEvolve get by default). Add an explicit list here to opt into a different mix — the optimizer never filters on its own.
arch_search.system_prompt_extra: Aim to propose at least 3 deliberately diverse candidates per batch — explore the extremes of (cores, accuracy, fragmentation) rather than clustering in one region.
